scripts.generate: go run ./.validate/cmd/variantgen && go run ./.validate/cmd/blockgen && go run ./.validate/cmd/tagsgen && go tool templ generate ./...
scripts.lint:ui8px: ui8px lint ui components utils examples examples/web/static/css/input.css examples/vite/dist/static/css/input.css
scripts.lint:ui8px:vite: cd examples/vite && bun run build && cd ../.. && ui8px lint examples/vite/dist/static/css/app.css
scripts.verify: bash .validate/scripts/validate-spec.sh --with-tests && bun run typecheck:react && bun run lint:ui8px && bun run validate:aria && bun run test:home-snapshot && bun run test:sheet-contract && go test ./...
